{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of Twin Stars
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Path of Twin Stars Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path]] of [[Twin Stars]] is a specialized progression method centered on the [[Heart of Twin Stars]], a technique that divides an individual's core into two separate parts. This division provides a natural defense by allowing a practitioner to rely on a secondary core if the first is disabled. Furthermore, it enables the user to house two distinct types of [[madra]] within a single body, potentially allowing for the simultaneous practice of two different [[Paths]]. While this capability offers significant advantages, such as using one core for [[pure madra]] and another for a different aspect to cover weaknesses, it also presents challenges; the smaller size of the split cores makes them difficult to increase in capacity without specialized assistance, and the [[Path]] can be slower to advance than single-core methods. Originally documented in a manual that [[Lindon]] eventually expanded into a comprehensive guide, the [[Path]] has evolved from a single technique into an organized movement known as the [[Sect of Twin Stars]]. The sect, which [[Lindon]] founded and is recognized as its [[Sage]], welcomes members from various backgrounds regardless of their original [[Path]]. Practitioners within the sect often utilize their dual cores to balance complementary elements, such as [[life]] and death or fire and water, though some simply use them to hold two different versions of the same type of [[madra]]. The sect is identified by various split-star symbols in different color combinations and has gained notoriety, with some even labeling it a cult due to its associations.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] writes 'The [[Path of Twin Stars]]' at the top of a page in his manual.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path]] of [[Twin Stars]] is a specialized progression that theoretically enables an individual to contain two distinct types of [[madra]] within a single body. [[Lindon]] utilizes the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] technique manual as his primary guide for this path and maintains detailed records regarding its development. To restore his [[madra]], he must follow a specific cycling process dictated by the path's requirements. Throughout his journey, [[Lindon]] incorporates new abilities into the [[Path]] of [[Twin Stars]], such as when he scrawled the [[Enforcer technique]] into it. Ultimately, [[Lindon]] comes to possess the [[Path]] of [[Twin Stars]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of Twin Stars]] allows a person to theoretically hold two types of [[madra]] in the same body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] technique manual is now [[Lindon]]'s instruction manual for the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] keeps records for the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] must cycle according to the [[Path of Twin Stars]] to restore his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] scrawled the [[Enforcer technique]] into the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] records his advancement in The [[Path of Twin Stars]] manual.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] is interested in [[Lindon]]'s [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Path of Twin Stars]] manual was in his pack.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of Twin Stars]] does not have an actual [[Enforcer technique]] for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has not developed a full-body [[Enforcer technique]] for his [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of Twin Stars]] takes a long time to raise.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] consulted his [[Path of Twin Stars]] manual to find a solution to his [[hunger madra]] problem.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has more right to the [[Path of Twin Stars]] than anyone but [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] switched to the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path of Twin Stars]] is a book.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
